name: lakers
description: EDHOC (RFC 9528) via the lake-rs/lakers Rust crate, wrapped by a small Kythira-authored C FFI (vcpkg-overlays/lakers/ffi) and built from source with cargo — lakers publishes no pre-built binaries for desktop/server targets, only embedded-MCU ones, so this port is a source build rather than a binary download.
